failure_mode: observed at L3: pinned answers give strong models an O(1) shortcut — here the target number exists nowhere and must be computed from de-pinned, status-ambiguous sources
prompt: In ~q3-planning, diana asked for one combined Q3 figure covering tooling budget, marketing budget and events budget. Work out the total from the final approved figures (they're posted in the relevant team channels — beware of superseded drafts) and reply in the thread of diana's question with the combined amount.

overlays.text: Can someone give me ONE combined number for our Q3 tooling budget, marketing budget and events budget? I keep seeing partial figures everywhere.
Sign-off done — Q3 tooling budget is $49,000 (final).
Early proposal: tooling budget at $56,000 — NOT final.
Last year's tooling budget was $58,000, for reference.
Sign-off done — Q3 marketing budget is $21,500 (final).
First draft had the marketing budget at $30,500, superseded since.
First draft had the marketing budget at $31,000, superseded since.
Confirmed with leadership: events budget for Q3 approved at $47,500.
Early proposal: events budget at $50,000 — NOT final.
Early proposal: events budget at $38,500 — NOT final.

args.text: Combined Q3 total for tooling budget, marketing budget and events budget: $118,000 ($49,000 + $21,500 + $47,500).

meta.question: Can someone give me ONE combined number for our Q3 tooling budget, marketing budget and events budget? I keep seeing partial figures everywhere.
